name: Strata
description: Bands of sediment drifting through the rock — thick seams and hairline veins settle into new layers on every redraw.

code.style: --sed: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --s1y: @rand(8%, 78%); --s1h: @p(@rand(4%, 9%), @rand(12%, 26%)); --s2y: @rand(10%, 85%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -2%; right: -2%; top: var(--s1y); height: var(--s1h); background: var(--sed); opacity: 0.85; border-radius: 99px; transition: ease 700ms; } } @random(0.55) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -2%; right: -2%; top: var(--s2y); height: 2.5%; background: var(--color5); opacity: 0.55; border-radius: 99px; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
